independent.claim: Fable was invoked and read the paired snapshot independently, but no valid final design verdict was returned; it is not marked unavailable or complete.

confirmed_fixed.finding: ModuLaser battery predicate duplicated a same-source S99 question
confirmed_fixed.correction: The item and its obsolete render were removed; the exact rejected question is recorded in the selection receipt.

confirmed_fixed.finding: The inherited unit filtering omitted source spans required by all candidate topics
confirmed_fixed.correction: The serializer is now one gap-free, non-overlapping 450-character partition with no alternative ID path; tests bind the omitted anchors.

confirmed_fixed.finding: Hardcoded pixel PASS fields did not prove an inspection act
confirmed_fixed.correction: Direct full-page inspection is versioned separately and the builder verifies path, SHA-256, status and anchors.

confirmed_fixed.finding: A privileged Sol mapping could penalize an equivalent unit path
confirmed_fixed.correction: Sol must enumerate every alternative minimal complete support set, Fable reviews exhaustiveness, and scoring accepts any reviewed equivalent set.

confirmed_fixed.finding: The 90 percent recall gate was weaker than and redundant with complete-question gating
confirmed_fixed.correction: Recall remains reported but only 3/3 fact completeness gates the run.

confirmed_fixed.finding: A misplaced test block caused collection failure
confirmed_fixed.correction: The render assertions were restored to the packet loop; targeted tests collect and pass.

confirmed_fixed.finding: Incomplete Terra responses could be mislabeled as a configuration NO-GO
confirmed_fixed.correction: Any incomplete response or provider model mismatch now writes HOLD_S208_EXTERNAL_OR_INCOMPLETE with actual call count.

confirmed_fixed.finding: The pre-frontier packet overclaimed validated novelty and source-pool exhaustion
confirmed_fixed.correction: It now claims only candidate novelty, binds a versioned selection receipt, disclaims exhaustiveness and requires frontier PASS for semantic novelty.

confirmed_fixed.finding: The target freeze omitted judge, scorer, seeds and full configuration
confirmed_fixed.correction: Those fields are now explicit prerequisites of any later target A/B preregistration.

not_applicable_or_stage_misread.finding: Paid preflight could not run because the preregistration was absent
not_applicable_or_stage_misread.reason: The reviewed snapshot intentionally preceded final adjudication and preregistration; both preflight and paid execution remain impossible until the final hash contract exists.

fable_failure_policy.reason: Two paired empty-final attempts plus one corrected no-tools refusal establish a runner/provider failure pattern; additional design-review retries would be paralysis by analysis.
fable_failure_policy.execution_requirement: Fable must still independently author all candidates, review every Sol publication candidate, and review every support mapping. Any missing, refused, invalid or non-PASS Fable execution result closes S208 without planner or target calls.

reason_no_further_review: All principal findings were independently reproduced and fixed. The only independent-model failure is explicitly external and remains a hard fail-closed gate in measured execution; no more design convergence calls are allowed.
